title: Enna Nenacha Nee Song Lyrics Chokka Thangam
stanzas:
Enna Nenacha Nee Song Lyrics From Chokka Thangam
#Deva #Unnikrishnan #AnuradhaSriram

Enna nenacha nee
enna nenacha
en nenjukulla unn
vachi thatcha podhu..

Enna nenacha nee
enna nenacha
en nenjukulla unn
vachi thatcha podhu..

sokki thavichen
sokki thavichen
naan sokka thangam
kittiyathaal thulli
kudhichen (2)

kutraala saaral adhu
kannoram oori vara
unna nenachen naan
unna nenachen
endha poorva jenma
punniyamo unna
adanjen.

naan thara sirippam
unnoda vetpam
naan thottu paakkurappa
enna nenacha

theekuchi vandhu
theekuchi kitta
soukiyam kaetkudhunu
naanum nenachen

un kanna kuli
mutham vachen
enna nenacha

en nenjukudi
meethan onnu
kaetka nenachen

en peraasa nooraasa
ketkayil adi thaemalli
nee enna nenachaddi

aareazhu kattilukkum
anjaaru thottilukkum
solla nenachen naan
solla nenachen
unna ottu moththa
kuthagaiyaa alla nenachen.

alla nenachen naan
alla nenachen
unna ottu moththa
kuthagaiyaa alla nenachen.

methaikkumela unnoda
seela enkaiyyil sikkum vela
enna nenacha

eppodhum pola
unnoda vela
arrambam aachuthunnu
naanum nenachen

nee ullkaayatha
paakkurappa enna nenacha
nee nagam vetta venummnu
solla nenachen.

naam onnodu onnaagum
nerathil un poondhegamnu
nenachaya

kalyanathula sorgathula
kacheri neramunu
katti pudichen naan
katti pudichen
en vetkam vittu
moochu mutta katti
pudichen

sokki thavichen
sokki thavichen
naan sorgathaiye
ettiyathaal thulli
kudhichen

kutraala saaral adhu
kannoram oori vara
unna nenachen naan
unna nenachen
endha poorva jenma
punniyamo unna
adanjen.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Enna Nenacha Nee'?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and affection, portraying the emotions of longing and joy in a romantic relationship.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Chokka Thangam'?

In Chokka Thangam, this song highlights a pivotal romantic moment between the lead characters, showcasing their emotional connection.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Anuradha Sriram and Unnikrishnan, both of whom bring a unique charm to the melody.

Who composed the music for 'Enna Nenacha Nee'?

The music for this beautiful song was composed by Deva, known for his melodious tunes in Tamil cinema.

When was 'Enna Nenacha Nee' released?

The song was released on January 15, 2003, and has since become a favorite among fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Enna Nenacha Nee', the singers Anuradha Sriram and Unnikrishnan deliver a heartfelt performance that encapsulates the joy and excitement of love. The song serves as a backdrop to a significant romantic moment in the movie Chokka Thangam, where the characters express their deep feelings for each other. With its melodious composition by Deva, the song evokes a sense of happiness and nostalgia. The lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of love, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enna Nenacha Nee from Chokka Thangam is a delightful romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Anuradha Sriram and Unnikrishnan, paired with Deva's melodious composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the magic of this timeless classic that resonates with every lover's heart.
stanzaMeanings: What I think of you, what I think of you, when I think of you in my heart..
What I think of you, what I think of you, when I think of you in my heart..
I have been hurt and I have been hurt, because I got Chokka Thangam, I jumped with joy (2)
In the rain, that is a beautiful place, I thought of you, I thought of you, what good deed from a past life brought you here.
I will give a smile, your anger, I am looking at you, what I think of you
The trouble came, the trouble came, I thought of asking for comfort from you too
I kissed your eyes, what I think of you
I thought of asking something from my heart
My name is called in a hundred ways, you thought of me in a different way
I thought of saying to the bed and the swing, I thought of saying, you are not just a mere toy.
No, I thought, no, I thought, you are not just a mere toy.
In the sky, your virtue will shine in my hands, what I think of you
Always like this, your work begins, I thought too
You are looking at me, what I think of you, you said you need to catch the snake.
We will become one in the time we are together, I thought you would think of your beauty
In marriage, in heaven, I tied the knot, I tied the knot, I let go of my shame and tied the knot
I have been hurt and I have been hurt, I jumped with joy because I reached heaven
In the rain, that is a beautiful place, I thought of you, I thought of you, what good deed from a past life brought you here.
